title: Corsican Milk Kid
description: The MOVING reference member state of this VC (Value Chain) is FRANCE INRAE. The reference MOVING Card ID of this VC is VC 12 FR. Milk Kid is seasonnaly produced, mostly for Christmas, by approximatively 200 farmers. An association of farmers intervene for slaughtering the animals and corresponding logistics. There are different circuits for selling the carcasses : direct selling from farmers, butchers' shop, ..

title: Mountain landscape and reference chains
description: The reference mountain chain of this VC is Corsican moutains. The reference mountain landscape of this VC is Corsica. Corsica is an island in the sea. It presents a great diversity of landscapes: plains, hillsides, deap and steep valleys Small ruminant farming has long been a transhumant activity, occupying all the region. For the past decades, farmers have settled, in the plains and hillsides. Some of them keep on using mountain pastures during Summer. They are scattered within the region, with no remarkable specialised sub-region.

title: Interest on this VC
description: high reputation products, coexistence between mountainous area and plains, competing access to milk (for processing or feeding the kid), strategy of localisation and contribution to villages vividness, resources linked to pastoral breeding (breeds, feeding species) and their associated know-how are diminushing, traditionnal dishes and local culinary heritage are diminushing as well. With modernization, milk kids have been a growing issue for dairy producers. They specialized in producing milk and they do not know what to do with kids. Local culinary uses have been diminushing, contributing to restraining the local markets and diminushing the added value obtained from one animal. Local farmers are looking for levers to improve this situation. local at the SES level and from the point of view of consumers and intermediate profession (butcher shops) could provide new insight.
objects: Milk, Dairy farming, Pastoralism, Animal breed, Farmer, Butchery, Mountain, Plain

title: Challenges
description: to (re)assemble resources that have been built and transmitted in the territory (breeds, feeding species.. ), especially to reconect intertwinned activities (milk lamb and dairy production) that have been set appart with agriculture modernization and specialization. To reconnect food production with food uses (cooking, eating habits, etc.). Overall the type of challenge faced by this VC is Current. This VC is classified as Traditional.
